title: Dragon Rage negates opponent magic as lightning response

card.rawText: When your opponent plays a magic card or lands an attack, negate the attack/magic card effect, and destroy all magic cards on the field. Both players then draw 3 cards.

plan.title: Dragon Rage negates opponent magic as lightning response
plan.summary: Opponent plays a magic card, Dragon Rage responds, and the triggering magic effect is negated before its effect applies.

notes: Pre-place Dragon’s Bane or another magic on field so Dragon Fire would have a visible effect if not negated.
Player 1 holds Dragon Rage available as Lightning.

steps: Open lightning response window for player_1.
Player 1 plays Dragon Rage in response.
Inspect that Dragon Fire's destroy effect did not resolve independently.
manualVerification: Confirm player cannot respond to their own latest chain link.
Confirm Dragon Rage can be played only by opponent of triggering magic/attack.
riskNotes: Card-specific negate condition is partial runtime support; chain window may exist but condition matching may fail.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate lightning condition and negation of triggering magic.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
